MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Larsen of Universal Shannon & Wheeler (916.780.4050) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party
Jon Universal of Universal Shannon & Wheeler (916.780.4050) for plaintiff and moving party
Kristian Whitten and Karen Yiu of the Attorney General's Office (703.5589) for defendant and responding party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF CHRYSLER LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. The Court relied on Revenue and Taxation Code Section 6934. Defendants withdrew numbers 18 through 22 of their evidentiary objections. The Court ruled on defendant's remaining objections as follows: objections numbered 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9, 10, 11, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27 and 28, are overruled; objections numbered 7, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16 and 17, are sustained. Order on objections signed in open Court. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order on the motion. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
